$comment: unsigned brand tokens — single source of truth (OPS-393 canon; foundation expansion 2026-07-10, operator-ratified: parallel grammar, full foundation, /learn first consumer). Values DERIVED from live usage (learn/styles.css WCAG-annotated + landing), normalized into scales — not invented. Legacy groups (color/font/motion) emit bare vars for back-compat; all other groups emit --<group>-<name>. `role` entries alias other tokens by name and emit var() references. Per-surface layout vars (--rail-w, --gutter, --measure) are deliberately NOT tokens.

role.$comment: semantic aliases — surfaces bind roles, not hues. THE accent is green; blue/purple/orange/red are semantic only (canon).

text.$comment: type scale from observed usage (10–16px data-dense cluster + heading steps). px strings.
text.label: 11px

z.$comment: stacking contexts by role, values from live /learn usage (grid backdrop 0 · content 1 · rail 80 · fixed header 90 · palette overlay 200).

grid.$comment: the 60px engineering grid is identity (`.impeccable.md` aesthetic direction).
